scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:i18n && npm run test:client
scripts.test:playwright: PLAYWRIGHT_DB_PATH=$(pwd)/server/data/viking.playwright.sqlite SNAPSHOT_URL=http://localhost:5174 SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:visual: PLAYWRIGHT_DB_PATH=$(pwd)/server/data/viking.playwright.sqlite SNAPSHOT_URL=http://localhost:5174 SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts playwright/ui-snapshots.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e: PLAYWRIGHT_DB_PATH=$(pwd)/server/data/viking.playwright.sqlite SNAPSHOT_URL=http://localhost:5174 SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts playwright/ui-flows.spec.ts
